title: Are you okay now?
prompt: Express your feelings about a difficult breakup in English.
hint: Talk about how you felt during and after the breakup.
sample: I was really hurt and struggled to move on after we broke up.

title: Starting love with hope
prompt: Describe the feelings when you start a new love.
hint: Talk about the excitement and hope at the beginning of love.
sample: When I started loving you, I didn't know how beautiful you were.

title: Unable to forget
prompt: Talk about someone you can't forget after a breakup.
hint: Describe how memories of that person still affect you.
sample: I still can't forget your face and I can't move on.

title: Dealing with pain
prompt: Explain how you cope with the pain of losing someone.
hint: Describe your emotional struggles and what helps you heal.
sample: Sometimes I feel overwhelmed, but I try to stay strong and hopeful.

title: Memories and moving on
prompt: Describe how memories affect your healing process after a breakup.
hint: Talk about the balance between remembering and moving forward.
sample: I try to remember the good times but also focus on healing and moving on.
